briefing: NASDAQ +1.2% and S&P +0.6% confirm a moderate risk-on session on the final trading day of Q2 2026. With $577 in cash, 4 open slots, and a clear best candidate, deploying into NVDA makes sense — it carries the full four-signal setup and has the lowest RSI (55.9) among the score-95 tier, leaving the most room before overbought territory. Existing positions are held; a moderate risk-on day doesn't warrant trimming winners.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Window dressing happens at the end of a quarter when fund managers buy stocks that have performed well so their portfolio looks impressive in reports sent to clients. It's not about genuine conviction — it's about appearances. This can briefly inflate prices of recent winners near quarter-end, which is worth knowing when interpreting a rally on the last trading day of March, June, September, or December.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「櫥窗粉飾」是指基金經理在季末買入近期強勢股，目的是讓投資組合在向客戶提交的報告中看起來更亮眼，而非出於真正的看好。這種行為純粹是為了形象，並非基本面驅動。在每年3月、6月、9月或12月的最後一個交易日出現的反彈，往往含有這種操作的成分，投資者解讀行情時需加以留意。

market_education.summary_en: Markets closed Q2 on a positive note, with the NASDAQ gaining 1.2% and the S&P 500 up 0.6%, supported by continued strength in AI-linked semiconductor names and easing macro concerns. End-of-quarter 'window dressing' by institutional managers — buying outperforming stocks to improve reported holdings — amplified moves in momentum names. Broad risk appetite remained intact with no major credit or geopolitical shocks to derail the session.
market_education.summary_zh: 市場以正面姿態結束第二季，納指上漲1.2%，標普500指數上升0.6%，主要受AI相關半導體股持續強勁及宏觀憂慮緩和所支撐。季末機構投資者的「櫥窗粉飾」操作——買入表現亮眼的股票以美化持倉報告——進一步放大了動能股的升幅。整體風險偏好維持穩健，市場未見重大信貸或地緣政治衝擊。

trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all four multi-signal confirmations (MACD crossover, RSI 55.9 in bullish zone with most upside room among top candidates, price above SMA-20, histogram rising) on a risk-on day; deploying remaining cash into the highest-quality name in the screener.
